summary: Immaculate soundboard capture of a short but superb two‑hour party‑like performance
review: The reviewer hails the recording as an “immaculate” 48‑track studio‑quality experience, with crystal‑clear highs, mids and lows that put every instrument up front. Even though the show is under two hours due to curfew, it’s described as superb from the first note, making both the music and the audio exceptionally enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed five‑star review praises both the performance and the pristine soundboard recording; high praise yields a near‑top rating, but confidence is low due to only one source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Immaculate sound with pronounced highs, mids and lows; bass described as the definition of electric bass; all instruments up front and crystal clear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Less than two‑hour set due to curfew but described as patently superb from start to finish.
